7 #include "FieldServiceValidatorService.h"
8 /* Author : dechaiss at Tue Jul 7 09:51:28 2009
9  * Generated by createNew
10  */
11 
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
13 #include <arcane/IVariable.h>
14 #include <arcane/IVariableMng.h>
15 #include <arcane/ArcaneTypes.h>
16 #include <arcane/utils/Collection.h>
17 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
18 #include <arcane/utils/Math.h>
19 #include <arcane/utils/NotSupportedException.h>
20 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
21 
22 using namespace Arcane;
23 
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 
27 void
28 FieldServiceValidatorService::init()
29 {
30  try
31  {
33  if (m_initialized)
34  return;
35 
37  m_mesh_group = mesh()->findGroup(options()->groupName());
38 
39  info() << "Looking for Group : " << options()->groupName();
40 
41  if (m_mesh_group.null())
42  {
43  if (options()->verbose())
44  {
45  pinfo() << "Available groups are :";
46  ItemGroupCollection coll = mesh()->groups();
47  for (ItemGroupCollection::Iterator i = coll.begin(); i
48  != coll.end(); ++i)
49  {
50  ItemGroup g = *i;
51  pinfo() << "\tGroup : " << g.name() << " size=" << g.size();
52  }
53  }
54  fatal() << "Cannot check on undefined group '"
55  << options()->groupName() << "'";
56  }
57 
59  IDataAccessor * reference_solution = options()->referenceField();
60  reference_solution->init(m_mesh_group);
61 
63  IServiceMng * service_mng = subDomain()->serviceMng();
64  IAppServiceMng * app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(service_mng);
65 
67  IDataAccessor* variable = options()->variableField();
68  variable->init(m_mesh_group);
69 
71  m_geometry_mng = app_service_mng->find<IGeometryMng> (true);
72 
74  m_geometry_mng->addItemGroupProperty(m_mesh_group,
75  IGeometryProperty::PMeasure, IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
76 
77 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
78 //#ifndef WIN32
79 //#warning "TODO: g�rer correctement la d�pendance � la g�om�trie"
80 //#endif
81 //#endif /* NO_USER_WARNING */
82  // Should have an update done : not the case (+ error if done manually)
83  // m_geometry_mng->update();
84 
85  }
86 
88  catch (const NotSupportedException& not_supported_exception)
89  {
90  not_supported_exception.explain(cout);
91  }
92  m_initialized = true;
93 }
94 
95 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
96 
97 int
98 FieldServiceValidatorService::validate()
99 {
100  try
101  {
102  if (!m_initialized)
103  fatal() << "Service not initialized";
104 
106  IVariable * isol = options()->referenceField()->variable(m_mesh_group);
108 
110  IVariable* ichecked = options()->variableField()->variable(m_mesh_group);
111 
112  // some properties about groups are checked first
113 
114  ItemGroup groupVar = ichecked->itemGroup();
115  ItemGroup groupSol = isol->itemGroup();
116 
117  // are groupVar and groupSol identical ?
118 
119  ItemVector intersection = BinaryGroupOperations::And(groupSol,groupVar);
120 
121  if ( intersection.size() != groupSol.size() || intersection.size() != groupVar.size())
122  warning() << "Checked and reference variables are not defined on the same group";
123 
124  // if m_mesh_group belongs to groupVar, the substraction of groupVar to m_mesh_group must be void
125  ItemVector substraction = BinaryGroupOperations::Substract(m_mesh_group,groupVar);
126  if ( substraction.size() > 0)
127  fatal() << "Variable must be checked on a group which belongs to variable's group";
128 
129  // if m_mesh_group belongs to groupSol, the substraction of groupSol to m_mesh_group must be void
130  substraction.clear();
131  substraction = BinaryGroupOperations::Substract(m_mesh_group,groupSol);
132  if ( substraction.size() > 0)
133  fatal() << "Variable must be checked on a group which belongs to solution's group";
134 
135  if ( ichecked->dataType() == DT_Real && isol->dataType() == DT_Real )
136  {
137  if ( ichecked->isPartial() && isol->isPartial() )
138  {
139 
140 
142  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Real> sol(isol);
144  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Real> var(ichecked);
145  return validateVariable(sol,var);
146  }
147  else if ( !ichecked->isPartial() && !isol->isPartial() )
148  {
150  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Real> sol(isol);
152  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Real> var(ichecked);
153  return validateVariable(sol,var);
154  }
155  else if ( ichecked->isPartial() && !isol->isPartial() )
156  {
158  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Real> sol(isol);
160  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Real> var(ichecked);
161  return validateVariable(sol,var);
162  }
163  else
164  {
166  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Real> sol(isol);
168  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Real> var(ichecked);
169  return validateVariable(sol,var);
170  }
171  }
172  else
173  if ( isol->dataType() == DT_Int32 && ichecked->dataType() == DT_Int32)
174  {
175  if ( ichecked->isPartial() && isol->isPartial() )
176  {
178  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Int32> sol(isol);
180  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Int32> var(ichecked);
181  return validateVariable(sol,var);
182 
183  }
184  else if ( !ichecked->isPartial() && !isol->isPartial() )
185  {
187  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Int32> sol(isol);
189  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Int32> var(ichecked);
190  return validateVariable(sol,var);
191  }
192  else if ( ichecked->isPartial() && !isol->isPartial() )
193  {
195  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Int32> sol(isol);
197  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Int32> var(ichecked);
198  return validateVariable(sol,var);
199  }
200  else
201  {
203  ItemPartialVariableScalarRefT<Int32> sol(isol);
205  ItemVariableScalarRefT<Int32> var(ichecked);
206  return validateVariable(sol,var);
207  }
208  }
209  else
210  {
211  if ( isol->dataType() != ichecked->dataType())
212  fatal() << "Checked and reference variables must be of same type";
213  else
214  fatal() << "Only Real or Int32 variables can be validated" ;
215  }
216 
217  }
218 
219  catch (const NotSupportedException& not_supported_exception)
220  {
221  throw ;
222  }
223  return 1;
224 }
225 
226 
227 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
228 template<typename VarT>
229 VarT FieldServiceValidatorService::relativeError(VarT a, VarT b)
230 {
231  VarT relative_error = 0;
232  if (!(math::isNearlyZero(a) && math::isNearlyZero(b)))
234  relative_error = math::relativeError(a, b);
235  return relative_error;
236 }
237 
238 
239 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
240 
241 template<typename VarT1,typename VarT2>
242 int
243 FieldServiceValidatorService::validateVariable(VarT1 & sol, VarT2 & var)
244 {
246  Real error = 0;
247  String error_type;
248  switch (options()->comparator)
249  {
250  case FieldServiceValidatorTypes::MaxRelativeError:
251  {
252  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,m_mesh_group.own())
253  {
254  error = math::max(error,(Real)math::abs(relativeError(var[*iitem],sol[*iitem])));
255  }
256  error
257  = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceMax, error);
258  error_type = "Maximum relative error";
259 
260  break;
261  }
262  case FieldServiceValidatorTypes::L2:
263  {
264  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & cell_measure =
265  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(m_mesh_group,
266  IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
267  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,m_mesh_group.own())
268  {
269  error += ((var[*iitem]-sol[*iitem])*(var[*iitem]-sol[*iitem]))
270  *cell_measure[*iitem];
271  }
272  error
273  = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, error);
274  error = math::sqrt(error);
275  error_type = "Error L2 norm";
276  break;
277  }
278  case FieldServiceValidatorTypes::L2Relative:
279  {
280  Real field = 0;
281  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & cell_measure =
282  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(m_mesh_group,
283  IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
284  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,m_mesh_group.own())
285  {
286  error += ((var[*iitem]-sol[*iitem])*(var[*iitem]-sol[*iitem]))
287  *cell_measure[*iitem];
288  field += sol[*iitem]*sol[*iitem]*cell_measure[*iitem];
289  }
290  error
291  = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, error);
292  error = math::sqrt(error);
293  field
294  = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, field);
295  field = math::sqrt(field);
296 
297  if(field == 0. && error == 0.)
298  error = 0.;
299  else if(field == 0. && error != 0.)
300  error = std::numeric_limits<Real>::max();
301  else
302  error = error / field;
303  error_type = "Error Relative L2 norm";
304  break;
305  }
306  case FieldServiceValidatorTypes::Linf:
307  {
308  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,m_mesh_group.own())
309  {
310  error = math::max(error,(Real)math::abs(var[*iitem]-sol[*iitem]));
311  }
312  error
313  = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceMax, error);
314  error_type = "Error Linf norm";
315  break;
316  }
317  default:
318  {
319  fatal() << "Error type " << options()->comparator()
320  << " not implemented. See in file FieldServiceValidator.axl available implementations";
321  }
322  }
323 
324  const bool isOk = (error <= options()->tolerance()); // cet ordre permet de g�rer les nans
325 
326  if (options()->verbose() or !isOk)
327  {
328  pinfo() << "Comparison of variable " << var.name() << " with " << sol.name() << " on group "
329  << m_mesh_group.name() ;
330  if (isOk)
331  pinfo() << error_type << " value " << error
332  << " is lower than tolerance " << options()->tolerance();
333  else
334  pinfo() << error_type << " value " << error
335  << " is greater than tolerance " << options()->tolerance();
336  }
337 
338 
339  if (!isOk)
340  {
341  return 1;
342  }
343  else
344  return 0;
345 
346 }
347 
348 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
349 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
350 
351 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_FIELDSERVICEVALIDATOR(FieldServiceValidator,FieldServiceValidatorService);
